CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Motion And Otion For Jdugemnt On The Pleadings On The Amended X-Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS ON THE AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288

Notice And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings On The X-Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: CROSS DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT.
Appearances: David W. Ammons of the Office of the City Attorney (554.3954) for cross-defendant and moving party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: granted with leave to amend. Cross-complainant must allege facts in the cross-complaint showing timely compliance with the claims statute or excuse for failing to timely comply. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
